.@JohnKerry: We urge all parties to ensure the safety and well-being of diplomatic missions and personnel and civilians throughout #Turkey.
.@JohnKerry: I spoke to FM Cavusoglu & emphasized U.S.’s absolute support for #Turkey’s elected, civilian gov't & democratic institutions.
.@JohnKerry: The United States views with gravest concern events unfolding in #Turkey. We are monitoring a very fluid situation.
.@POTUS & @JohnKerry agreed all parties in Turkey should support the democratically-elected Gov't of Turkey, show restraint, avoid violence.
